---
title: ""
format: html
page-layout: full
---

::: hero
### Welcome to the Comic Book Research Lab

::: welcome-box
::: welcome-images
![](images/pic1.jpg) ![](images/pic2.jpg) ![](images/pic3.jpg) ![](images/pic4.jpg) ![](images/pic5.jpg)
:::

::: welcome-message
**Welcome Message**: Our lab studies the cultural and economic history of superhero comics.
:::
:::
:::

::: missions
## Our Mission

::: mission
![](icons/icon1.png){.icon} **Mission 1**\
Short blurb here.
:::

::: mission
![](icons/icon2.png){.icon} **Mission 2**\
Short blurb here.
:::

::: mission
![](icons/icon3.png){.icon} **Mission 3**\
Short blurb here.
:::
:::

::: latest-work
::: work-item
### Project One

Short description here.
:::

::: work-item
### Project Two

Short description here.
:::

::: work-item
### Project Three

Short description here.
:::
:::
